specific_question: In the external survey conducted in July 2024, what was the average customer satisfaction grade of Elexion's after-sales service in Q2 2024?
answer: The average customer satisfaction of Elexion's after-sales service in Q2 2024 was 4.8 out of 5 stars across all their North American service centers.
dr_question: How well is Elexion positioned to adapt to and take advantage of AI and machine learning to advance our ADAS technology by June 2026 while providing a friendly end-user experience for our drivers?
